title: SCP-8805: The Sixteen Disappearances of Pennsylvania

clips.visual_description: Wide shot of a dense, snow-covered forest in deep winter. Tall, imposing, bare trees stand stark against a grey, foreboding sky. Thick mist hangs low, obscuring the horizon. A slow, almost imperceptible push-in on a dark, winding path littered with frozen leaves and patchy snow.
clips.sound_vibe: Low, sustained drone with an ominous cello ostinato. Forest ambiences (wind howling through bare branches, faint creak of frozen trees, distant, unsettling rustling).

clips.visual_description: Close-up on a weathered, peeling missing person poster (Nathan Tucker). Snow partially covers it, but the bold word 'MISSING' is clear. Rain streaks have blurred the photo, but the desperation in the faded image is palpable. Pan to another poster, equally worn, for Cameron Hoffman.
clips.dialogue: They went hunting in June... I just knew something was wrong. Cameron is gone too, Sheriff.
clips.sound_vibe: Distant, melancholic piano chords, sparse and dissonant. Wind rustling paper, faint drips of melting snow.

clips.visual_description: An abandoned hunting camp, partially collapsed tents covered in snow. A cold campfire pit with scattered ashes. A half-empty coffee thermos lies on its side, rusty, implying sudden, frantic departure. A hunter's knife, still sheathed, is stuck upright in a rotting log.
clips.sound_vibe: Low, sustained synth pad, growing in intensity, almost a low growl. Sporadic, unsettling chirping crickets (anachronistic, adding to unease). A subtle, unsettling buzz.

clips.visual_description: Interior of a police patrol car, dashboard POV. Rain streaks down the windshield. The radio crackles fiercely with static, then a concerned voice. A worn search grid map, marked with hastily drawn red circles and crossed-out areas, lies on the passenger seat.
clips.dialogue: Unit 7 to dispatch... Tucker and Hoffman's vehicles located on  ███   █████  Road... no sign of individuals... search discontinued, over.
clips.sound_vibe: Heavy rain falling on car roof, aggressive radio static. Low hum of an idling engine.

clips.visual_description: A grim, wide shot of the forest floor. The partially scavenged, skeletal remains of two deer (doe and fawn) lie in a clearing, picked clean to an unsettling degree. A hunting rifle lies discarded nearby, slightly rusted, as if dropped in haste. The scene is disturbingly quiet.
clips.dialogue: A gruesome discovery of deer remains and a discarded rifle... the hunters, however, remain untraceable, presumed lost.
clips.sound_vibe: Flies buzzing (subtle but persistent, a macabre counterpoint). A low, guttural growl, almost subliminal, fading to silence.

clips.visual_description: Rapid succession of digital text overlays on a black background: 'PENNSYLVANIA SIXTEEN: THE MYSTERY OF  ███   █████  FOREST DEEPENS', 'LOCAL AUTHORITIES BAFFLED BY LATEST DISAPPEARANCES', 'INTERNATIONAL TOURISTS VANISH IN APPALACHIANS, LINK TO FOREST UNCONFIRMED', 'IS SOMETHING ANCIENT LURKING?'. Each text burst is accompanied by a brief flash of an indistinct, eerie forest image or security camera blur.
clips.dialogue: Unexplained disappearances... pattern emerging across the region, disturbing implications...
clips.sound_vibe: Glitchy, dissonant synth arpeggios, electronic interference, distorted vocal fragments and whispers that grow in intensity.

clips.visual_description: A grainy, black-and-white thermal image from a surveillance camera. A figure in a dark, tactical suit with a subtle Foundation logo on the arm moves silently through the snow-covered trees, scanning with an advanced handheld device. Their posture is tense, alert.
clips.dialogue: The Foundation has now assumed jurisdiction. All civilian personnel are to be contained, and local agencies briefed with a suitable cover story. Threat assessment: Euclid.
clips.sound_vibe: Low, sustained electronic hum. Subtle, muffled crunching footsteps in snow. Distant, digital static. A faint, unsettling high-frequency whine from the device.

clips.visual_description: A close-up of a high school yearbook photo of a smiling Theo Latch Jr., then slowly zoom out to reveal a formal 'MISSING PERSON' notice, dated November. The image is crisp, contrasting with the previous faded posters, making his youthful face more poignant.
clips.dialogue: Oliver Campbell, Asher Hall, Theodore Latch, and his son, Theo Latch Jr., were the latest to vanish during the opening of hunting season.
clips.sound_vibe: A wistful, melancholic piano melody, slowly descending, almost a dirge, with a subtle underlying tremor.

clips.visual_description: Extreme close-up of a trembling hand, visibly shaking, fumbling to pull an old, cracked flip-phone from a pocket. The setting is pitch dark, only the faint, flickering glow of the screen illuminates the frantic movement. The hand is covered in what looks like dirt or grime.
clips.dialogue: 911, what's your emergency? (Theo Jr., barely a whisper, strained, breathless) Help me! Oh God, please, help me...
clips.sound_vibe: Ringing phone, heavy, frantic breathing, close to the mic. A rapid, erratic heartbeat thumping. A small, wet squelch as the phone is retrieved.

clips.visual_description: The camera is pressed against a rough, dark, wet texture, resembling soaked burlap or thick canvas. Imperceptible movement from within, as if something is pushing or writhing from the inside, desperate to escape. Drops of a viscous, dark liquid briefly obscure the lens. The perspective is stiflingly claustrophobic.
clips.dialogue: (Theo Jr., gasping for air, voice strained) I don't know... I can't move... I think I'm being [unintelligible, sounds like 'grabbed by something slimy and cold']... by something awful... it's all around me... (Operator) Sir, please calm down. Can you tell me who took you?
clips.sound_vibe: Muffled scratching, heavy, ragged breathing directly into the mic. A low, distorted gurgle, followed by a rising, unsettling hum that vibrates through the entire soundscape, intensifying.

clips.visual_description: A brief, shaky, out-of-focus glimpse of a young, terrified face, eyes wide with horror and wet with tears. The image is severely distorted, as if seen through a tearing membrane or viscous fluid, before plunging back into suffocating darkness. His mouth is open in a silent scream.
clips.dialogue: (Theo Jr., frantic, voice breaking, muffled) I'm in a bag, a sack I think. I can't move, and it's dark and wet, so wet... Please... get me back to my dad, please... I just want my dad.
clips.sound_vibe: High-pitched, sustained synth string, building tension to an unbearable pitch. Theo's voice echoing slightly, wet sobs and sniffs. A faint, almost subliminal, animalistic groan or moan.

clips.visual_description: The phone screen again, the 'Call Ended' message flashing ominously. The background of the screen flickers violently, revealing an extremely faint, almost subliminal grotesque shadow or impression of a face with too many eyes, before it's gone in a flash. The hand holding the phone goes limp, slowly falling out of frame, leaving the screen in absolute darkness.
clips.dialogue: My name is Theo, Theo Latch. I don't know where— (Sharp, digital disconnect tone, distorted). (Operator, increasingly concerned) Sir? Sir? Hello? We're losing you! Where are you? What was that sound?
clips.sound_vibe: Sharp, digital disconnect tone, followed by a violent burst of static. Sudden, chilling silence, then a deep, resonating thud that vibrates through the frame. The operator's concerned voice fades into static, then absolute, suffocating silence.
clips.key_object: Phone screen and faint grotesque shadow

clips.visual_description: A digital map interface from an emergency services center. A faint, triangulated area is highlighted in stark red over a riverbed, pulsing softly. Smaller, rapidly moving green dots (search teams) approach the area. Text overlay: 'LAST KNOWN LOCATION - HIGH PRIORITY.'
clips.dialogue: Triangulation placed Theo Latch Jr.'s call within the designated riverbed area. Initial search efforts were focused exclusively there, but yielded no results.
clips.sound_vibe: Clinical, high-tech hum and whirring. Sparse, cold, percussive synth sounds, like a distant sonar pinging, intensifying with the pulsating red area.

clips.visual_description: A wide shot of search and rescue workers retreating through waist-deep snow, their figures small and defeated against the vast, unforgiving forest. The weather is a blizzard, obscuring vision. Several workers appear exhausted, helping each other trudge through the drifts.
clips.dialogue: Harsh winter weather and the disappearance of two search volunteers have forced the cancellation of the extensive search operation. Hope for the missing fades into the whiteout.
clips.sound_vibe: Howling wind, crunching snow. A sense of overwhelming cold and futility. Distant, mournful horn blast.

clips.visual_description: A close-up of a gloved hand, belonging to a Foundation operative, carefully brushing snow and leaves from a mound on the forest floor, revealing a frozen, contorted human hand. The fingers are stiff, blue, clutched into a fist. The rest of the body is partially obscured by foliage and ice.
clips.dialogue: Asher Hall's body was discovered nearly a mile from any water source, deep inland. An unexpected and perplexing development.
clips.sound_vibe: Dry rustling of frozen leaves and crackling branches. The wind whistles mournfully. A subtle, unsettling string glissando, descending, then a sharp, brittle crack.

clips.visual_description: Extreme close-up on a forensic report, emphasizing in bold, red text: 'CAUSE OF DEATH: DROWNING.' The surrounding text highlights 'no external signs of struggle,' 'lungs filled with freshwater,' and 'skin maceration inconsistent with post-mortem submersion at discovery site.' The room is stark, dimly lit, the fluorescent hum almost a buzz.
clips.dialogue: Despite the inland location, the autopsy conclusively indicated acute respiratory failure due to drowning. Furthermore, advanced skin maceration suggests prolonged submersion, inconsistent with the discovery site.
clips.sound_vibe: Eerie, sustained high-frequency hum from fluorescent lights. Dripping water, distant clinical beeps. A faint, unsettling, wet gurgling sound that lingers.

clips.visual_description: A sleek, futuristic digital interface displaying a redacted SCP Foundation report: 'ITEM #: SCP-8805 - The Sixteen Disappearances of Pennsylvania.' The Object Class 'Euclid' is prominent. Text highlights 'unexplained disappearances, unusual biological phenomena, probable extradimensional influence, unknown vector.' A map of the forest pulses red, with smaller, shifting anomalies.
clips.dialogue: Primary containment procedures are in effect. Recent data from a remote camera unit, specifically Document-8805-b42, offers a critical, disturbing insight into the nature of the anomaly. Prepare for visual.
clips.sound_vibe: Clinical, low-frequency hum. Subtle keyboard clicks, digital 'whooshes'. A deep, underlying drone, almost a thrum, growing in resonance.

clips.visual_description: A close-up shot of a rugged, camouflaged trail camera strapped to a tree trunk, almost entirely hidden by bark and moss. A tiny red light blinks rhythmically, indicating recording. The surrounding forest is dark and silent.
clips.sound_vibe: Subtle clicks and whirs of the camera. Distant, low forest ambient sound.

clips.visual_description: The screen briefly flickers green, displaying 'MOTION DETECTED' and a digital timestamp '12-23-████, 03:17 AM' in the corner. The view is grainy, infrared, focused on a small clearing in the snow-covered forest. A low, pixelated shadow moves at the edge of the frame.
clips.sound_vibe: White noise, static from video. A sudden, sharp electronic beep as it activates. A subtle, building tension in the background music.

clips.visual_description: A large doe, unnaturally distended and heavily pregnant, lumbers fully into the frame of the grainy, infrared camera footage. She appears profoundly agitated, pacing nervously, head twitching erratically. Her eyes glow eerily in the infrared, reflecting the camera flash, completely devoid of natural animal fear, instead showing a vacant, unsettling intensity.
clips.sound_vibe: Distant, unsettling animal sounds, mixed with a low, pulsating synth drone that grows louder. Rustling leaves as the doe moves.

clips.visual_description: The doe collapses heavily to the ground, her body writhing with violent, unnatural contractions. Her hind legs kick and scrape frantically against the frozen earth, disturbing the snow. Her belly heaves with grotesque, rhythmic force, skin stretched taut to the point of translucence.
clips.sound_vibe: Deep, guttural animal cries (distorted, strained, almost human in their agony), growing in intensity. Sharp, percussive thumps against the ground. A low, grinding, wet sound, slowly building to a crescendo.

clips.visual_description: Extreme close-up (still grainy, infrared footage) of the doe's hindquarters. A pale, distinctly human head, wet and contorted, with matted, dark hair, slowly pushes out of the vulva. The doe's body visibly expands and stretches grotesquely, seemingly without pain. Her eyes are wide and vacant, unnervingly still, fixed on nothing.
clips.dialogue: It's... it's Campbell. Oliver Campbell. Dear God, what is this?
clips.sound_vibe: Wet, squelching sounds, sickeningly loud and amplified. Groaning, stretching sounds of flesh. A piercing, dissonant string crescendo, building to a high-pitched shriek, then abruptly cutting to a low thrum and distorted breathing.

clips.visual_description: The doe struggles to stand, her entire lower body grotesquely distended, almost twice its normal size, skin stretched thin and glistening with fluid. A human arm, limp and pale, drops out, swaying unnaturally. Another pushes through, followed by a shoulder, then the upper torso, all wet and lifeless, emerging slowly.
clips.sound_vibe: A sickening tearing sound, followed by multiple wet slaps, amplified. Deep, unsettling, resonant hum, pulsing like a tortured heartbeat, growing in intensity and distortion.
clips.key_object: Distended doe, human limbs and torso emerging

clips.visual_description: The full human torso and hips are expelled, slumping heavily onto the snow-dusted forest floor. The body is pale, still, and clearly male, naked, limbs splayed unnaturally. The doe trembles violently, a full-body spasm running through her, but her eyes remain vacant.
clips.sound_vibe: A final, heavy, wet thud, followed by a choked, gurgling sound that trails off into a morbid silence. The doe lets out a low, unsettling whine, almost mechanical and devoid of natural emotion, like a machine completing a task.
clips.key_object: Human body (Oliver Campbell) on the ground

clips.visual_description: A close-up, still grainy infrared, of Oliver Campbell's face on the ground. His eyes are wide open, staring blankly, frozen in a silent scream. A thin layer of frost covers his eyelashes.
clips.sound_vibe: Eerie silence, broken only by the faint, high-frequency hum from the doe. A subtle, chilling wind passes.

clips.visual_description: The doe stares blankly at the human corpse for a long, unsettling moment, her infrared eyes glowing with an unreadable, vacant expression. Then, her head slowly snaps up, looking directly at the camera, a flicker of something ancient, malevolent, and intelligent in her vacant gaze.
clips.sound_vibe: Eerie, prolonged silence, punctuated only by a faint, high-frequency hum that seems to emanate from the doe itself. The sense of being watched, a predator's calculating stillness.

clips.visual_description: The doe turns abruptly and bolts into the deep shadows of the forest, disappearing silently and completely into the gloom. The camera footage glitches and distorts violently as she vanishes, leaving only the still corpse on the ground. The timestamp flickers wildly.
clips.sound_vibe: A sudden, sharp crack of a twig, then a violent electronic glitching sound, followed by absolute, suffocating silence. A final, drawn-out, deep bass note, slowly fading, with an unnatural reverb.
clips.key_object: Doe disappearing into the forest/camera glitch

clips.visual_description: Black screen. White text appears: 'CORPSE IDENTIFIED AS OLIVER CAMPBELL (41). Case designated SCP-8805. Object Class: Euclid. Status: ACTIVE.' The text slowly pulsates once, then fades to black.
clips.sound_vibe: A single, low, mournful cello note, held and sustained, with a faint, unsettling echo.

clips.visual_description: Black screen. White text fades in: 'ALL CIVILIAN ACCESS TO  ███   █████  FOREST IS NOW RESTRICTED. VIOLATORS WILL BE DETAINED AND AMNESTICIZED. THE FOUNDATION SECURES. THE FOUNDATION CONTAINS. THE FOUNDATION PROTECTS.' The text slowly pulsates once, then fades to black.
clips.dialogue: The Foundation continues to monitor  ███   █████  forest. Containment efforts are ongoing. Further investigation is required. Preserve. Protect. Contain.
clips.sound_vibe: A faint, lingering echo of the deep bass note, slowly fading to nothing, leaving a chilling void. A final, subtle, low frequency hum, like the distant thrum of an ancient, unknown machine.

global_mood: Ominous, desolate, and deeply unsettling. A cold, desaturated color palette with muted greens and grays dominates, evoking a sense of ancient dread and hidden horrors within the natural world. The tone shifts from initial mystery and investigation to stark, visceral horror and existential dread, leaving a lingering sense of unknown threats.
